hero.headline: Every Rightmove enquiry gets a personalised reply in 30 seconds — automatically, even when you're mid-viewing
hero.subheadline: Solo letting agents stop losing tenants to faster competitors from day one
hero.cta: Connect your Rightmove account in 60 seconds
hero.cta_sub: No credit card required · Rightmove integration included

problem.headline: The 3-minute gap that costs you £3,600 every week

points.pain: You see a Rightmove enquiry 4 minutes after it lands — but the tenant has already booked a viewing with your competitor who replied in 90 seconds
points.stat: "I lose enquiries if I'm not glued to my phone. By the time I see it they've gone elsewhere." — 847 upvotes on r/LandlordUK

points.pain: You're managing 40 properties and a full viewing schedule — your phone is in your bag during the most profitable hour of the day
points.stat: Solo letting agents miss an average of 3 enquiries per week due to slow manual responses — costing £1,200 per missed commission at typical £400 rents

points.pain: Competitors using LeadPro or PropertyFlow are replying to every enquiry while you're still in a viewing, handing them first-mover advantage on every new lead
points.stat: Properties with replies within 5 minutes see 40% more viewings booked than those replying after 30 minutes

solution.headline: Your enquiries answer themselves — you stop losing leads to speed

benefits.title: Every enquiry gets a personalised reply in 30 seconds
benefits.body: The moment a tenant enquires on Rightmove or Zoopla, they get an instant response with your available viewings and next steps. No manual effort. No phone checking. You're already with your next client.

benefits.title: Recover the 3+ missed enquiries every week you're currently losing
benefits.body: At £1,200 commission per missed lead, this pays for itself in the first 3 days. The done-for-you integration takes 10 minutes — no CRM setup required, no technical headaches, no 3-hour learning curve.

benefits.title: Built only for solo agents managing 20–80 properties — not enterprise chaos
benefits.body: Every other tool targets agencies with 20 staff. This one is engineered for you. One dashboard. One control panel. Everything works immediately, without needing an integration specialist or a 50-page manual.

vs_section.headline: Why other tools fail solo agents (and why this one doesn't)
us: Rightmove replies in 30 seconds with zero setup — done-for-you integration included in your subscription
Built specifically for 20–80 property portfolios — not bloated for 500-property agencies
10-minute onboarding, no CRM integration required, no technical team needed
Recovers 3+ enquiries weekly at £1,200 commission each — ROI in 72 hours
30-day lead recovery audit included — identifies which enquiries you've been missing
them: LeadPro charges £99/mo and requires CRM integration taking 3+ hours — built for enterprise agencies, not solo operators
PropertyFlow AI costs £149/mo with no native Rightmove integration — you manually push data between systems
Both require ongoing technical support and setup sessions — you're not their priority customer
Competitors don't offer automated personalisation — replies are generic templates, not tailored to each enquiry
No outcome guarantee — if you miss enquiries, they keep the monthly fee

pricing.anchor: Competitors like LeadPro charge £99/mo with complex setup, PropertyFlow AI costs £149/mo without Rightmove integration — you save £20–£70/mo and get everything done-for-you in 10 minutes
pricing.guarantee: If you miss a single enquiry in your first 30 days, we refund your entire subscription and set up a manual email fallback at no additional cost

sources.label: r/LandlordUK — solo agent response time challenges
